name: mr-context
description: Multi-Repository semantic graph context for GitHub Copilot. Reduce hallucinations and token waste during AI-assisted development.

chatParticipants.name: mrc
chatParticipants.description: Multi-repository semantic context for Copilot Chat. Ask @mrc anything about your codebase.

commands.name: query
commands.description: Answer a question about the codebase

commands.name: feature
commands.description: Plan and scaffold a new feature

commands.name: review
commands.description: Review a diff or code snippet

languageModelTools.name: mr-context_ask
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Retrieve the most relevant multi-repository codebase context for a natural-language question. Returns a ranked, summarized context block drawn from the Mr. Context semantic graph across all indexed repositories. Prefer calling this BEFORE answering any question about how this codebase works, where functionality lives, which files are involved, or how repositories relate — it is far cheaper than reading whole files and provides cross-repository context the open editor lacks.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Retrieve relevant codebase context from the Mr. Context semantic graph

query.description: The natural-language question or topic to retrieve context for.

topK.description: Optional maximum number of graph nodes to include.

languageModelTools.name: mr-context_search
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Search the Mr. Context semantic graph for files relevant to a query and return a ranked list with summaries. Use to locate where specific functionality is implemented across the indexed repositories.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Search the semantic graph for relevant files

languageModelTools.name: mr-context_dependencies
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Trace the import/dependency graph outward from a given file for N hops using the Mr. Context semantic graph. Use to understand what a file depends on or how change impact propagates across repositories.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Trace the import graph for a file

filePath.description: Starting file path as it appears in the graph.

languageModelTools.name: mr-context_pattern
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Find all files implementing a specific design pattern (singleton, factory, repository, observer, middleware, strategy, decorator, hook) across the indexed repositories using the Mr. Context semantic graph.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Find files implementing a design pattern

pattern.description: Pattern name: singleton | factory | repository | observer | middleware | strategy | decorator | hook

languageModelTools.name: mr-context_file
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Retrieve a specific file's metadata (summary, exports, imports, detected patterns) from the Mr. Context semantic graph by its path. Use to inspect a single known file without reading its full contents.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Get a file's metadata from the graph

filePath.description: File path as it appears in the graph.

mr-context.configPath.description: Path to .mrc/config.json file (defaults to .mrc/config.json in the workspace root)

mr-context.maxContextNodes.description: Maximum graph nodes to include in each LLM prompt

mr-context.autoEnrich.description: Automatically enrich graph with semantic summaries on startup
